name: Doodles
notes: Offshore on ENE winds. Rocky reef offshore produces long rides on bigger swell. Gentle takeoff — good for progression. No wind or light SE ideal.

name: Big Bay
notes: Offshore on ENE winds. Exposed to SW groundswell. Works at all tides. Popular kite spot — often windy.

name: Derdesteen
notes: Offshore on ENE winds. Fast hollow lefts, shorter powerful rights. Dangerous rips. Can't handle very large swell — best at 2-4ft. Go early to beat crowds and wind.

name: Melkbosstrand
notes: Offshore on NE/SE winds. Needs solid swell to fire. Tube Wave = quality barrel on big days. Heavy rip on pushing tide.
